name: accounting firms managing 10-20 client tax filings/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10-20 client tax filings/month, missed deadlines cause penalties. We streamline compliance workflows instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
target_audience: accounting firms managing 10-20 client tax filings/month
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and managing multiple compliance deadlines for client tax filings.
features: status tracking for each client's filing
